THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACKHAUS, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARUSO, JOSEPH $4,651.51 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,766.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
